scene_title: Interface de IA como pergaminho digital
narrative_beat: Tela de codigo dourado sobre data center P&B

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid glowing digital scroll interface in gold and crimson with illuminated medieval manuscript borders showing bright text in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the luminous gold and crimson digital scroll interface
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated data center with rows of servers and blinking lights in background
props: glowing digital scroll interface in gold and crimson

composition.foreground: digital scroll in vivid gold crimson

symbolism.primary: the glowing digital text as Revelation verse made interactive
symbolism.secondary: medieval borders on modern screen as collapse of two millennia

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
